summary: Correct the remaining exact-head hosted M4 performance, composite-timeout, and license-bearing DMG lifecycle failures without weakening their assertions or retry policy.

externalInputs.purpose: Inspect the exact-head Ubuntu production-static 124.3 ms AC-15.a failure and the M4 journey's outer 30-second timeout after forward progress.
Inspect the exact-head macOS runner rejection of the unsupported hdiutil -acceptlicense option.
Confirm that the prior bare attach presented the embedded Apache license and canceled only when stdin reached EOF.

decisions.decision: Retain the currently parsed mesh when a newly presented result has the same application-verified SHA-256 geometry identity and parser, but reparse changed identities, unverified byte references, parser changes, and retries after parse failure.
decisions.rationale: A memory-cache hit clones its result bytes. Keying the parser effect only to the result object needlessly recopied and reparsed identical STL geometry on the normative under-100-ms interaction path. Identity-scoped reuse removes that work without discarding current diagnostics, statistics, or other result metadata.

decisions.decision: Set the one stateful M4 journey's outer Playwright timeout to 480 seconds while preserving its existing per-step 30/60-second bounds, one worker, and zero retries.
decisions.rationale: The journey contains sequential bounded operations whose documented maxima total roughly 390 seconds. Playwright's inherited 30-second whole-test default preempted valid forward progress before the journey's own assertions could report failures; eight minutes remains finite and leaves each behavioral threshold unchanged.

decisions.decision: Supersede D-0415's unsupported -acceptlicense attempt with exactly one 'Y' response on stdin to the single image-last, read-only hdiutil attach command under pipefail and an EXIT detach trap.
decisions.rationale: The current macOS runner proves that attach has no -acceptlicense option, while the earlier run shows the embedded license prompt is attached to stdin and cancels at EOF. A single Y response is the bounded mechanism under test, not a claimed pass; exact hosted confirmation remains required. One bounded response avoids an unbounded yes stream, while pipefail and cleanup preserve fail-closed lifecycle evidence.

testEvidence.criterion: The hosted config must own a finite composite envelope larger than its preserved step bounds, with no retries or parallel workers.
testEvidence.test: Import the real Playwright config and require exact timeout, retries, workers, testMatch, and retained journey step bounds.

red.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/ui/viewer/ModelViewer.theme.test.tsx tests/scripts/m4-hosted-config.test.ts tests/scripts/windows-installer.test.ts --reporter=dot --maxWorkers=1
red.outcome: RED: the focused config assertion received undefined instead of 480000; the same bounded run also failed the two other newly added contracts and passed 19 existing tests.

green.outcome: GREEN after review repair: both files and all 20 tests passed in 2.77 seconds. The config test pins the exact ordered multiset of every explicit journey timeout.

testEvidence.criterion: Identical verified geometry must not invoke the parser again, while a changed verified identity still must.
testEvidence.test: Render a parsed model, rerender cloned bytes under the same valid SHA-256 identity, then present a different valid identity and count parser invocations.

red.command: Ubuntu production-static browser job 88249728921 plus white-box trace of ModelViewer's result-keyed parse effect
red.outcome: RED: the normative cache paint was 124.3 ms, and every cloned cache result retriggered the result-dependent parser path and worker byte copy.

green.outcome: GREEN after independent-review repair: both files and all 20 tests passed in 2.77 seconds. Same verified identity and parser reuse once; changed identity or parser reparses; an invalid identity never reuses even with the same mutable byte reference; and a rejected verified identity retries. Exact hosted under-100-ms confirmation remains required.

testEvidence.criterion: The license-bearing DMG must attach through one bounded affirmative response, reject the unsupported option and unbounded/bypassed alternatives, and detach after any later failure.
testEvidence.test: Parse the workflow and assert the exact pipeline, strict shell mode, one attach command, forbidden alternatives, and cleanup trap.

red.command: macOS Desktop installer job 88249728880; focused Vitest run at 2026-07-19T23:32:45-06:00
red.outcome: RED hosted: hdiutil rejected -acceptlicense as unknown. RED locally: the workflow lacked strict pipeline mode and the exact stdin response contract.

green.outcome: GREEN after independent-review repair: the file and all 4 tests passed in 957 ms. The contract exact-asserts the attach block, forbids quiet/image-key/multiline-ignore variants, verifies mounted-flag ordering, and requires cleanup detach-failure propagation. Exact hosted macOS attachment confirmation remains required.

nearMisses.confirmation: The first fixture omitted the required sha256: prefix and therefore exercised the intentional byte-reference fallback. It was corrected to valid application identity strings before the final green run.
The first expected template accidentally retained patch-marker plus signs. The production workflow was unchanged; only the malformed expectation was corrected before the final green run.

The first correct inline implementation pushed the UI file to 414 lines and failed the 400-line policy. Geometry-key tracking was extracted into the existing viewer-defaults module; the UI returned to exactly 400 lines, all 17 viewer tests passed, and the source-policy gate passed.

nearMisses.sought: Verified-identity-only reuse and complete timeout evidence
nearMisses.confirmation: Independent review found one Major and one Minor: the first extracted helper reused an identical unverified mutable byte reference, and the config test sampled rather than pinned step bounds. The helper now refuses every missing/invalid identity; parser-change and failed-parse retries are covered; the journey test exact-asserts all seven timeout literals. Focused review-repair evidence is 20/20 green, and bounded re-review closed at 0/0/0/0/0.
Rejected -quiet, undocumented image keys, unbounded yes input, retries, and ignored attach failures. The workflow supplies one affirmative response and propagates either pipeline failure.

Independent review found one Major and one Minor: the first test accepted multiline ignored attach failures, quiet/image-key variants, no-op cleanup, ignored detach failures, and wrong mounted-flag ordering; the ledger also described stdin Y acceptance as proven. The strengthened test rejects all six named mutants and passed 4/4, while the corrected decision labels Y acceptance as pending exact hosted proof. Bounded re-review closed at 0/0/0/0/0.

questions: Q-0038 and Q-0039 are resolved. Exact hosted Ubuntu and macOS confirmation remains evidence work, not an owner decision.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
